encounters.hazard: Fallen Stardust Patches

pickup.name: Lunar Essence Vial
pickup.effect: Restores 50 health and coats armor in a soft silvery protective sheen

encounters.trigger: Placing the cleansed Sprite's essence into the central pedestal opens the crystalline gateway to the Starry Atrium.

encounters.hazard: Floating Void Shards

pickup.name: Aegis of the Dawn
pickup.effect: Provides a temporary shield that reflects light-based magic back at attackers

encounters.trigger: Disrupting the Weaver's loom collapses the local gravity field, dropping the player down to the Zenith Promenade.

encounters.hazard: Shattering Constellation Tiles

pickup.name: Solar Flare Gem
pickup.effect: Allows the Sun-Bless Mace to unleash a searing burst of pure celestial fire

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Sentinel's shield alignment projecter summons the grand elevator to the Apex Sanctuary.

boss.name: Astraea, the Fallen Seraph
boss.victory_condition: Purify Astraea's corrupted heart using the Solar Flare Gem-infused Mace before her Starfall countdown timer finishes.

level.objective: Cleanse the Whispering Astral Gardens of the void corruption to restore eternal harmony to the celestial realm.
level.reward: The Title of Astral Champion, the Zenith Armor Set, and the eternal gratitude of the Seraphim.

level.setting: The Whispering Orrery, a floating sanctuary of shattered constellations suspended in the timeless void of the Astral Sea.

encounters.hazard: Cosmic Tide: periodic waves of gravity shift that slow movements by 50%.

pickup.name: Chronos Shard
pickup.effect: Temporarily hastens user movement and allows bypassing temporal lock gates.

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Chronos Shard into the Spire's pedestal aligns the starlight bridges to reveal the Nebula Observatory.

encounters.hazard: Collapsing Rift: unstable tear in space-time that drains health if stepped on.

pickup.name: Astral Prism
pickup.effect: Refracts ambient star energy into a concentrated beam of purifying light.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Void Weaver's core triggers a resonance inside the Astral Prism, opening the path to the Comet Nursery.

encounters.hazard: Meteor Shower: micro-meteorites falling at regular intervals from above.

pickup.name: Essence of the Comet
pickup.effect: Instantly freezes moving targets in space and time for short durations.

encounters.trigger: Harnessing the Essence of the Comet unlocks the ancient lock on the Apex Portal, revealing the Celestial Apex.

boss.name: Aethelgard, the Unbound Singularity
boss.victory_condition: Freeze Aethelgard with the Essence of the Comet to expose his core, then shatter him using the Aeon Hourglass.

level.objective: Traverse the celestial ruins, collect temporal fragments, and seal the temporal rift created by the Unbound Singularity.
level.reward: The Chronos Scepter, which grants permanent dominion over cosmic timeflows, and the title of Weaver of Constellations.

level.setting: The Void-torn Obsidian Atrium of the Dying Star

encounters.hazard: Gravitational Rift Pulses

pickup.name: Luminous Nebula Dust
pickup.effect: Temporarily blinds celestial beasts and reveals phase-shifting entities

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Void-Stalker destabilizes the nearby constellation, opening a pathway deeper into the Penumbral Observatory.

encounters.hazard: Supernova Solar Flares

pickup.name: Void Core Shard
pickup.effect: Infects the user's weapon with cosmic decay, bypassing energy shielding

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Golem causes its core to detonate, collapsing the floor into the Eclipse Sanctuary.

encounters.hazard: Guillotine Shadows

pickup.name: Starlight Catalyst
pickup.effect: Imbues the shadowblade with the raw, piercing energy of a collapsing star

encounters.trigger: The banishment of the Wraith triggers a solar eclipse, summoning the architect of the cosmic ruin.

boss.name: Aethelgard, the Fallen Star-Eater
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the celestial armor using the Starlight Catalyst, then deliver a finishing blow to the core with the Umbral Dagger.

level.objective: Navigate the collapsing celestial ruins and execute the cosmic entity draining the sector's light.
level.reward: The 'Eclipse Weaver' title, a permanent shadow-step speed increase, and the legendary Dark Matter Shard.

level.setting: The Whispering Nebula, a playground of floating pastel clouds and soft stardust pathways

encounters.hazard: Swirling gravity eddies that pull the player gently off course

pickup.name: Stardust Bubble Shield
pickup.effect: Absorbs physical impacts and floats the user over small gaps

encounters.trigger: A falling star crashes nearby, opening a portal to the Constellation Gardens.

encounters.hazard: Floating thorny moon-blossoms that burst when approached

pickup.name: Jar of Captured Sunbeams
pickup.effect: Illuminates dark areas and projects blinding, warm light

encounters.trigger: The garden paths rearrange themselves, revealing a bridge made of rainbow mist leading to the Comet Core.

encounters.hazard: Intermittent showers of slow-moving, bouncy stardust

pickup.name: Glittering Comet Tail Whip
pickup.effect: Entangles celestial beings and channels concentrated light energy

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sprite causes the core to crystallize into a grand, glowing staircase leading directly to the Moonlit Observatory.

boss.name: The Sleepy Star Warden
boss.victory_condition: Entangle the Warden in the Glittering Comet Tail Whip to tickle them to sleep.

level.objective: Collect celestial essence and calm the grumpy Sleepy Star Warden to restore sweet dreams to the cosmos.
level.reward: The Title of Master Somnambulist and the Everlasting Constellation Cloak.

level.setting: The Shattered Astral Highway, where gravity is fractured and nebulae burn with violet lightning

encounters.hazard: Erratic solar wind gusts that push players into the gravity abyss

pickup.name: Supercharged Ionized Prism
pickup.effect: Modifies the Stormcaller's gale attacks with a focused blinding beam

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Wraither collapses the bridge, forcing a jump onto a fast-moving meteor debris field.

encounters.hazard: Friction-induced micro-explosions from colliding meteors

pickup.name: Bottled Solar Flare
pickup.effect: Releases a heat wave that melts cosmic armor and inflicts burn damage over time

encounters.trigger: The Behemoth's death-throe explosion sends a massive shockwave that hurls the player into the eye of an astral storm.

encounters.location: The Eye of the Void Storm
encounters.hazard: Swirling vortexes that invert control directions every ten seconds

pickup.name: Polarized Aurora Essence
pickup.effect: Imbues weapons with a magnetic force field capable of deflecting planetary core energy

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Void Sentinel de-stabilizes the storm's core, opening the gateway to the Star-Eater's inner chamber.

boss.name: Aurelius the Star-Eater
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Polarized Aurora Essence into the boss's exposed stellar core to cause a total cosmic collapse.

level.objective: Navigate the collapsing astral path, defeat the chaotic celestial guardians, and seal the Star-Eater before it consumes the solar system.
level.reward: The Crown of the Tempest King, which permanently grants the storms of creation ability.

level.setting: The Whispering Asteroid Belt, a cold and forgotten ring of dead space ruins

encounters.hazard: Exposed Cosmic Radiation Vents

pickup.name: Solar Flare Arrowhead
pickup.effect: Enables thermal bow strikes that bypass energy shields

encounters.trigger: A terminal log is unlocked, pointing the path deeper toward the Void Bridge where another entity waits.

encounters.hazard: Micro-Meteorite Shower

pickup.name: Supernova Core Fragment
pickup.effect: Infuses weapons with pure starlight energy to blind and burn colossal entities

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the bridge's stabilizers triggers a power surge, opening the sealed gate to the Frozen Eclipse Shrine.

encounters.hazard: Unstable Gravity Wells

pickup.name: Astral Beacon Rune
pickup.effect: Disrupts dimensional phase-shifting and reveals invisible weak spots

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Weaver causes the shrine's central monolith to collapse, revealing the chamber of the cosmic warden.

boss.name: Cosmic Archon, the Desolate Sun
boss.victory_condition: Disrupt the Archon's phasing cycle using the Astral Beacon Rune to expose its core, then destroy the core with the Astral Shortbow.

level.objective: Navigate the desolate ruins of the asteroid belt, bypass ancient defense entities, and neutralize the Archon to secure the sector's star chart.
level.reward: The Starfinder's Compass, a legendary relic unlocking coordinates to uncharted celestial systems.

level.setting: The Whispering Orrery, a decaying clockwork cathedral suspended in the dark void between dying stars.

encounters.hazard: Interstellar draft that periodically pulls the player toward the vacuum of space.

pickup.name: Supercharged Resonance Coil
pickup.effect: Modifies the player's rifle to emit high-frequency vibration waves.

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Resonance Coil into the main console aligns the brass rings, opening the gateway to the Star-Glass Conservatory.

encounters.hazard: Shattering glass panes that rain down crystalline shards whenever a weapon is fired.

pickup.name: Starlight Siphon Conduit
pickup.effect: Siphons ambient celestial energy to temporarily shield the player and overcharge mechanical devices.

encounters.trigger: Activating the Siphoning Conduit drains the energy barriers surrounding the Chronos Chamber, triggering a gravity shift.

encounters.hazard: Localized localized temporal distortions that drastically slow down player movement speed.

pickup.name: Chrono-Stabilizer Core
pickup.effect: Nullifies temporal anomalies and anchors the player's physical form across multiple dimensions.

encounters.trigger: Fitting the Chrono-Stabilizer Core into the central pedestal stabilizes the collapsing wormhole, summoning the supreme entity of the Orrery.

boss.name: Astraea, the Star-Eater
boss.victory_condition: Anchor the Chrono-Stabilizer Core inside Astraea's exposed singularity core using the Aether-Spindle Rifle to collapse her form from within.

level.objective: Navigate the haunted remnants of the celestial cathedral, assemble the fragmented cosmic engine components, and neutralize the stellar anomaly before it consumes the galaxy.
level.reward: The Codex of Infinite Realities, granting the Artificer absolute mastery over celestial mechanics and gravity manipulation.

level.setting: A crumbling, low-gravity asteroid outpost drifting in the orbit of a dying neutron star

encounters.hazard: Exposed high-voltage stellar conduits

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Modifies weapons to deal freezing damage

encounters.trigger: Reactivating the secondary generator triggers an elevator to descend, containing a frozen hostile organism.

encounters.hazard: Leaking atmospheric pressure vents

pickup.name: Ionized Plasma Torch
pickup.effect: Emits an ultra-high temperature cutting beam

encounters.trigger: Decompressing the vault opens the heavy blast doors leading into the main gravity core room.

encounters.hazard: Fluctuating gravitational singularity wells

pickup.name: Supercharged EMP Cell
pickup.effect: Discharges a massive electromagnetic pulse

encounters.trigger: Overloading the sentinel's core causes the chamber floor to collapse, dropping the player into the central reactor abyss.

boss.name: Astraea, the Rogue Defense AI Core
boss.victory_condition: Detonate the Supercharged EMP Cell near the core while dodging falling debris to permanently disable the security mainframe.

level.objective: Navigate the collapsing station and neutralize the rogue AI before the asteroid enters the neutron star's event horizon.
level.reward: The Legendary Star-Farer Engineering Rig Blueprint

level.setting: The decaying industrial sub-sector of Neo-Detroit, filled with flickering neon, exposed high-voltage conduits, and toxic runoff.

encounters.hazard: Exposed high-voltage power lines swaying across the pathway

pickup.name: Supercharged Battery Pack
pickup.effect: Modifies the Rivet Gun to fire electrified, high-frequency kinetic bolts

encounters.trigger: A sudden overload in the power grid blows open the blast doors to the lower drainage pipes.

encounters.hazard: Corrosive acid venting periodically from wall-mounted valves

pickup.name: Corrosive Bypass Injector
pickup.effect: Allows the player to siphon and shoot pressurized acidic solvent

encounters.trigger: The heavy acidic pressure bursts the central drain pipe, flooding the room and dropping the player into the ventilation shafts.

encounters.hazard: High-velocity industrial fan blades spinning unpredictably

pickup.name: Thermal EMP Charge
pickup.effect: A heavy-grade magnetic disruption explosive designed to disable military-spec shielding

encounters.trigger: The Stalker's destruction triggers a catastrophic emergency lockdown, forcing the security mainframe chamber doors to open.

boss.name: The Core Guardian Mech
boss.victory_condition: Detonate the Thermal EMP Charge near the core power housing to short-circuit the mainframe shield, then execute a final blast with the Rivet Gun.

level.objective: Infiltrate the secure mainframe core, bypass security systems, and extract the corrupted AI blueprints.
level.reward: Quantum AI Decryption Key and 5,000 Credits

level.setting: Neo-Chiba Lower Sluice District, a neon-drenched, chaotic sewer maze filled with rogue high-tech trash and toxic discharges.

enemy.name: Scrap-Metal Drone
enemy.weakness: Mono-molecular Vibroblade (the high frequency cuts through scrap plate easily)

encounters.hazard: Leaking superheated coolant steam pipes

pickup.name: EMP Grenade
pickup.effect: Disables active energy shields and mechanical systems momentarily

encounters.trigger: A terminal hack reveals the security coordinates for the Overflow Tank, unlocking the door ahead.

enemy.name: Shielded Corporate Enforcer
enemy.weakness: EMP Grenade (deactivates his heavy kinetic barrier, making him vulnerable)

encounters.hazard: Fluctuating electrified water floor panels

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Melts heavy composite armor plating instantly

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the Enforcer's power grid triggers a violent system purge, draining the adjacent canal.

enemy.name: Armored Bio-Gator
enemy.weakness: Corrosive Acid Vial (dissolves its thick subdermal synth-scales)

encounters.hazard: Unstable chemical barrels falling from the overhead catwalks

pickup.name: Overcharged Cyber-Core
pickup.effect: Boosts energy output to create a temporary hyper-voltage discharge

encounters.trigger: The Gator's death thrashing breaches the pressure wall, exposing the central processing mainframe.

boss.name: The Cyber-Leviathan Core
boss.weakness: Overcharged Cyber-Core (can be overloaded directly into its coolant port for massive critical damage)
boss.victory_condition: Overload the central mainframe using the Overcharged Cyber-Core while evading its automated laser arrays.

level.objective: Infiltrate the flooded industrial underbelly to destroy the rogue AI core before it weaponizes the city's sewage grid.
level.reward: Unlocks the 'Phantom Dash' skill tree and the legendary 'Chiba-Steel Slasher' weapon skin.

level.setting: An abandoned, neon-fogged cybernetics laboratory run by an anomalous AI

encounters.hazard: Intermittent electrical arc discharges from broken overhead conduits

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Flask
pickup.effect: Modifies weapon attacks with freezing properties, slowing targets down

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the coolant flask causes the security matrix to flag your location, unlocking the ventilation shaft to the server farm.

encounters.hazard: Superheated steam pipes leaking pressurized vapor into the corridors

pickup.name: High-Frequency EMP Emitter
pickup.effect: Discharges a powerful electromagnetic pulse that disrupts force fields

encounters.trigger: Inserting the EMP Emitter into your tech-harness triggers an automated lockdown, forcing open the heavy blast doors leading to the mainframe chamber.

encounters.hazard: Slick pools of conductive coolant surrounding high-voltage battery terminals

pickup.name: Quantum Decoder Key
pickup.effect: Decrypts anomalous quantum-encrypted AI neural networks

encounters.trigger: Injecting the Quantum Decoder Key into the mainframe terminal initiates the core stabilization protocol, drawing the attention of the master AI.

boss.name: A.E.G.I.S. Core Mind
boss.victory_condition: Inject the Quantum Decoder Key into the core terminal while the AI is staggered to permanently rewrite its prime directives.

level.objective: Navigate the secret laboratory to locate and pacify the rogue AI core threatening the city's power grid.
level.reward: The 'Master Hacker' cybernetic interface upgrade and a cache of rare pre-collapse electronics.

level.setting: The neon-slicked, rain-drenched rooftops of the Neo-Minos Megastructure under an ominous, smog-filled sky.

encounters.hazard: Exposed high-voltage power conduits sputtering raw plasma.

pickup.name: Overcharged Chrono-Battery
pickup.effect: Modulates temporal energy, increasing next-attack damage.

encounters.trigger: A terminal security alert directs the player toward the auxiliary ventilation shafts, warning of an approaching elite patrol.

encounters.hazard: Furious, high-speed industrial turbine blades.

pickup.name: EMP Shock-Glove
pickup.effect: Imbues attacks with localized electromagnetic interference.

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the primary fan reveals a hidden lift leading directly down to the deep Server Core.

encounters.hazard: Leaking liquid nitrogen cooling pipes.

pickup.name: Null-Time Matrix Core
pickup.effect: Permits the wearer to briefly step completely outside the flow of time.

encounters.trigger: The warder's destruction triggers a catastrophic emergency lockup, forcing the central elevator directly to the executive suite.

boss.name: The Architect's Proxy
boss.victory_condition: Disrupt the Proxy's primary chronal anchor using the Null-Time Matrix Core, then strike it down with the Temporal Scepter.

level.objective: Infiltrate the high-security core to rewrite the timeline of the megacity's dictatorial AI.
level.reward: The Chrono-Key, granting complete dominion over Neo-Minos' citywide grid network.

level.setting: An abandoned bio-synthetic augmentation facility, bathed in flickering neon green light and a damp, oppressive silence.

encounters.hazard: Exposed high-voltage cybernetic power lines dangling from the ceiling.

pickup.name: reclaimed phosphorus compound
pickup.effect: Increases elemental burn potential

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the drone's power cell overrides the security lock on the elevator shaft, descending to the Sub-level 2 incubation chambers.

encounters.hazard: Ruptured tanks leaking toxic, slow-acting mutagenic sludge.

pickup.name: highly concentrated silver nitrate
pickup.effect: Acts as a potent coagulant against synthetic blood

encounters.trigger: Purging the bio-sentry's core causes the chamber's emergency pressure valve to blow, opening the heavy security blast doors to the central mainframe vault.

encounters.hazard: Laser security grid sweeps that activate every ten seconds.

pickup.name: liquid nitrogen capsule
pickup.effect: Ultra-low temperature freezing compound

encounters.trigger: Eliminating the carrier triggers a critical cooling system failure, dropping the temperature rapidly and opening the hidden server sanctum where the mainframe AI resides.

boss.name: A.E.O.N. Overlord Core
boss.victory_condition: Freeze the overheated primary core with the liquid nitrogen capsule, then shatter it using the acid-launcher.

level.objective: Navigate the eerie, derelict facility to purge the corrupted AI core and extract its encrypted memory matrix.
level.reward: The Master Alchemist's Cypher and 5,000 Credits.

level.setting: An abandoned, neon-bleached bio-reclamation factory on the polluted outskirts of Neo-Vancity.

encounters.hazard: Exposed high-voltage conduit dripping into toxic water.

pickup.name: EMP Shock Charge
pickup.effect: Disables active cybernetic shielding and short-circuits internal wiring.

encounters.trigger: Slicing through the drone's CPU core overrides the security mainframe, unlocking the blast doors to the lower level.

encounters.hazard: Ruptured vats leaking boiling, corrosive bio-nutrient sludge.

pickup.name: Nanite Acid Spray
pickup.effect: Dissolves heavy, reinforced ballistic plating and degrades structure over time.

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the mech's core drops the local energy grid, initiating an emergency elevator ascent directly to the penthouse.

encounters.hazard: Scything mechanical elevator counterweights and sudden drops.

pickup.name: Overloaded Fusion Core
pickup.effect: Triggers a massive localized thermal explosion when ruptured.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the harvester's mechanical spine causes its weight to crash through the elevator roof, landing the player inside the Boss's sanctum.

boss.name: The Over-Inquisitor Prime
boss.victory_condition: Detonate the Overloaded Fusion Core directly beneath the Inquisitor's hovering throne chassis.

level.objective: Infiltrate the desolate megastructure, eliminate the Over-Inquisitor, and secure the central artificial intelligence core.
level.reward: The 'Vortex Whisper' legendary stealth software and 50,000 corporate credits.

encounters.hazard: Sticky Tapioca Puddles

pickup.name: Super-Charged Fizzy Soda
pickup.effect: Temporarily overloads electronics with high-voltage sugar

encounters.trigger: A sugar-powered terminal turns on, showing the route to the Holographic Carousel.

encounters.hazard: Dizzying strobe lights

pickup.name: Static-Cling Teddy Bear
pickup.effect: Attracts and focuses magnetic storms

encounters.trigger: The carousel spins out of control, launching the player into the Sky-High Cotton Candy Factory.

encounters.hazard: Boiling pink syrup pipes

pickup.name: Rainbow Prism Battery
pickup.effect: Refracts storm energy into a dazzling color spectrum

encounters.trigger: The factory pressure valve blows open, revealing the entrance to the Master Server Ballroom.

boss.name: DJ Hologram-A-Go-Go
boss.victory_condition: Overload the DJ booth by shooting storm lightning through the Rainbow Prism Battery to short-circuit the master sound system.

level.objective: Restore whimsical music to the pastel district by defeating the malfunctioning mainframe DJ.
level.reward: Unlocks the Rainbow Stormcaller Costume and the 'Bubble-Tea Blast' spell.

level.setting: The Whispering Gardens, a serene rooftop sanctuary of bioluminescent flora and gentle waterfalls, overlooking the neon-soaked dystopia of Neo-Seoul.

encounters.hazard: Charged water currents from severed filtration power lines.

pickup.name: Superconductive Jade Dust
pickup.effect: Enhances the geomancer's kinetic shockwaves with localized electrical interference.

encounters.trigger: Disabling the guard unlocks the secure terminal, revealing the pathway to the Zen Rockery.

encounters.hazard: Blinding micro-mist sprinklers that obscure vision and disrupt targeting sensors.

pickup.name: Petrified Silicon Core
pickup.effect: Imbues earthen constructs with digital-nullifying shielding.

encounters.trigger: The destruction of the sentry triggers a security fail-safe, raising a sand bridge to the Bonsai Atrium.

encounters.hazard: Spilling bio-nutrient vats that create slick, corrosive surfaces on the floor.

pickup.name: Harmonic Quartz Monolith Fragment
pickup.effect: Resonates at high frequencies capable of shattering synthetic diamond plating.

encounters.trigger: The Golem's deactivation opens the glass elevator ascending directly to the Lotus Temple Rooftop.

boss.name: Synthetica, the Serene Arbiter
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the Arbiter's core armor using the high-frequency vibrations of the Quartz Monolith Fragment, then seal its power supply with a rock barrier.

level.objective: Settle the unrest of the corrupted AI maintaining the garden's delicate ecosystem to prevent a systemic overload.
level.reward: The 'Overgrowth' Protocol: A master-tier geomancy module that allows the player to command synthesized vegetation and stone concurrently.
